title: senecio olgae
intro: Senecio olgae, also known as Kermes oak or Resurrection plant, is a succulent perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help protect the liver and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Senecio olgae include its ability to improve digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Senecio olgae plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and longevity.
